generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense planner, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to have robust local preparedness. The data shows that communities with strong civil defense programs experience 30% fewer casualties during emergencies. It's not about fear—it's about responsibility. We owe it to our families and neighbors to be prepared. #CommunitySafety #CivilDefense
